message:
fix(codegen): Replace assertEqualGeneric fallback with PyValue.from().eql()

Phase 8 of anytype elimination:
- Replace the last anytype fallback in assertEqual with PyValue.from().eql()
- assertEqualGeneric was O(n²) monomorphization per (TypeA, TypeB) combination
- PyValue.from() monomorphizes per type (bounded), eql() compiles once
- Handles class instances, dicts, sets, mixed types via PyValue interface
